name: scaffold-project
description: Scaffolds a new greenfield project's minikube dev-workflow (start/stop/dev/build/port-forward/bootstrap scripts + package.json wiring), with every minikube profile bound explicitly from day one so scaffolded projects never collide on minikube's shared default profile.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a greenfield project's minikube dev-workflow scripts with explicit profile binding.
interface.longDescription: Scaffold Project generates a new project's local minikube dev-workflow — start, stop, dev, build, port-forward, and bootstrap scripts plus package.json wiring — from vetted templates. Its central guarantee is that every minikube and kubectl invocation is bound to an explicit per-project profile sourced from a single common.sh variable, fixing a profile-collision bug where scripts silently operated on minikube's shared default profile instead of one tied to the project. The result is a fresh repo whose dev scripts never interfere with an unrelated project's minikube state.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a new project's minikube dev-workflow scripts.
Set up minikube start/stop/dev/build scripts for this project.
Bootstrap a fresh repo's local dev-workflow with an explicit minikube profile.
